# Implementation Log

## Current Milestone

M3: implementation and validation.

## Scope

Five-layer realtime page translation architecture: Segmenter, Scheduler, Provider, Render, and Rule/AI Strategy.

## Changed Files

| File | Change | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `extension/core.js` | Added segment metadata, work planning, site-rule parsing, strategy merging, and progress rendering. | Make page translation explicit and testable. |
| `extension/content.js` | Uses `planTranslationWork()`, sends segment requests, applies site rules, and updates page progress. | Improve realtime experience and full-page coverage. |
| `extension/background.js` | Added provider defaults, `translateSegments()`, and namespaced cache keys. | Prepare for multiple engines and prevent stale cache reuse. |
| `extension/options.html` | Added site-rule textarea. | Allow per-site include/exclude tuning. |
| `extension/options.js` | Loads and saves `siteRules`. | Persist rule configuration. |
| `tests/core.test.js` | Added tests for segment metadata, scheduler, rules, and progress rendering. | Cover the new architecture layers. |
| `tests/background.test.js` | Added tests for segment translation and cache namespace. | Cover provider-layer behavior. |
| `docs/*` | Added longtask requirements, architecture, benchmark, test, and implementation records. | Keep the long task auditable. |

## Validation

| Command or check | Result | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| `npm test` | Pass | 43 tests, 0 failures |
| `npm run lint` | Pass | `Checked extension/manifest.json and 8 extension files.` |
| TDWH HTML sampling | Pass | 85 targets, first ten follow top-page order: TDWH, brand, Home, GEOInsights, AIVisibility, Reports, TrustData, Search, Home, GEOInsights |

## Rollback Notes

- Revert the files listed above to return to the previous direct `collectTargets -> text batch -> render` pipeline.
- Cache keys now use `v2`; reverting would re-enable old `v1` cache behavior but not delete stored cache.

## Open Questions

- Whether to add Chrome built-in Translator API as a second provider in the next pass.
- Whether progress UI should auto-hide after a delay or remain until stop/reload.

## 2026-05-15 PDF And Three-Screen Lazy Loading

### Page Lazy Loading

- `planTranslationWork()` now accepts `maxScreensAhead` and returns `deferred` segments.
- The content script queues only the current viewport plus the next two screens, then rescans on scroll/resize to translate newly visible ranges.

### PDF Support

- Added a toktra-owned PDF viewer page because Chrome's built-in PDF viewer is not a reliable content-script target.
- Added `pdf-viewer-core.js` for PDF text line grouping and three-screen segment selection.
- Added `pdf-viewer.js`, `pdf-viewer.html`, and `pdf-viewer.css`.
- Bundled `pdfjs-dist` viewer runtime files under `extension/vendor/`.
- Popup now opens the PDF viewer for URLs ending in `.pdf`.

### Validation

- `npm test`: 47 tests, 0 failures.
- `npm run lint`: checked manifest and 14 extension files.
